# Promptamist

AI-Powered Prompt Management Platform. Organize, build reusable templates, and share your AI prompts — works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and all major LLMs.

## What is Promptamist?

Promptamist is the intelligent prompt management tool for AI power users. It solves the #1 problem for AI practitioners: losing great prompts in endless chat logs.

According to users, the most painful part of working with AI is rebuilding the same prompts over and over. Promptamist gives you a structured, searchable library for all your prompts — with support for dynamic template variables that turn static prompts into reusable, fill-in-the-blank workflows.

## Key Features

- **Organized Prompt Library**: Store, tag, and search all your AI prompts in one structured workspace. Filter by tags, prompt type (template vs static), and creation date.
- **Dynamic Template Variables**: Create reusable prompt templates with named variables (e.g., {{topic}}, {{tone}}). When using a template, simply fill in the values to generate a customized prompt instantly.
- **Public Prompt Sharing**: Share any prompt publicly via a unique URL (e.g., repromptamist.vercel.app/p/your-prompt). Anyone can view, use, and copy the prompt without an account.
- **Multi-Model Support**: Prompts work with any AI model — ChatGPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4), Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Mistral, Llama, and any other LLM.
- **Private by Default**: All prompts are private unless explicitly made public. Full control over your intellectual property.
- **Prompt Statistics**: Dashboard showing total prompts, templates, public shares, and activity over time.

## Supported AI Models

Promptamist is model-agnostic and supports:
- OpenAI ChatGPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4, GPT-3.5 Turbo)
- Anthropic Claude (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Haiku)
- Google Gemini (Gemini 1.5 Pro, Gemini Flash)
- Meta Llama (3.1, 3.2, 3.3)
- Mistral AI (Mistral Large, Mistral Nemo)
- Any other LLM accessible via API or chat interface

## Public URLs

- https://repromptamist.vercel.app — Landing page and dashboard
- https://repromptamist.vercel.app/sign-up — Create a free account
- https://repromptamist.vercel.app/sign-in — Sign in to your account
- https://repromptamist.vercel.app/p/[slug] — Public shared prompt pages

## Technical Stack

- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Convex (Real-time backend / database)
- Clerk (Authentication)
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- TypeScript

## Pricing

- **Free Tier**: Available with a prompt limit for getting started
- **Premium Plans**: Higher prompt limits and advanced features for power users

## Company

Promptamist is an open-source AI productivity tool.
- GitHub: https://github.com/itsyasirkhandev/promptamist-rebuild
